channel.title: Formal Methods on Eric Spencer
channel.description: Recent content in Formal Methods on Eric Spencer

item.title: Resilient
item.description: A statically-typed compiled language for safety-critical embedded systems, with Z3-verified contracts and self-healing runtime blocks

item.title: Rubik's Snake — Formally Verified
item.description: Coq (Rocq) and TLA+ specifications of the Rubik's Snake state space — 4^23 configurations, formally

item.title: TLA+ Model of a Walk-In Oven
item.description: A formal TLA+ specification of a walk-in industrial oven with a focus on safety interlocks.

item.title: TLA+ Model of a Laptop
item.description: A formal TLA+ specification modeling a laptop's power states, battery, lid, thermals, and auto-suspend.

item.title: TLA+ Model of Dexcom G7
item.description: A formal TLA+ specification of the Dexcom G7 continuous glucose monitor's behavior and safety properties.

item.title: TLA+ Formal Generation
item.description: Early exploratory repo for generating TLA+ specs from natural-language requirements with an LLM, with a TLC harness wired in. The scaffold that eventually grew into ChatTLA+.

item.title: Researcher
item.description: Research on TLA+ and fine-tuning open-source LLMs for formal methods.

item.title: Web Based TLA+ Microwave
item.description: An interactive microwave in the browser to learn TLA+
